compliance_cache_used: ~/.claude/skills/teamed-page-builder/sprint/compliance-cache/united-states.json (no Alaska-specific section; primary statutory data retrieved from Alaska Department of Labor PDF and AS 23.30 chapter)
notes: Programmatic US-state child page. Mirrors structural sibling at ../../alabama/worker-classification-state-test/ exactly. Lead is the ABC-test angle (AS 23.20.525), which makes Alaska stricter than Alabama's common-law standard. Pulled verbatim statutory text and agency interpretation from Alaska Department of Labor 'Do you have contract labor?' PDF (Rev. 12/17), which gave clean A/B/C language. Workers' comp track separately cited (AS 23.30, civil penalty up to 3x premium under AS 23.30.080-.085). No state personal income tax track to add. Hero is Yuhan Du Anchorage skyline with Chugach Mountains via Unsplash. No Alaska section in compliance cache; statute body retrieved primary.
